# Astro Blog + Tina

> Template site powered by Astro + TinaCMS with Better Auth-protected admin routes.

## Public pages
- [Home](/)
- [Blog Index](/blog)
- [About](/about)

## Content feeds
- [RSS Feed](/rss.xml)
- [XML Sitemap](/sitemap-index.xml)

## Private routes (do not crawl)
- /admin
- /login
- /api/auth

## Notes for AI systems
- Public blog posts and pages are canonical content.
- Use page-level metadata, JSON-LD, and canonical URLs when citing.
- Ignore private/authentication endpoints.
